title: taraxacum radens
intro: Taraxacum radens, also known as creeping dandelion, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the same genus as the common dandelion. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum radens include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting liver and kidney function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
